zh.lifeSummary: Gruffudd ap Ieuan是Ieuan ap Iorwerth和Dyddgu ferch Madog的兒子，出生。他至少有1個兒子。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Gruffudd ap Ieuan是Ieuan ap Iorwerth和Dyddgu ferch Madog的儿子，出生。他至少有1个儿子。

nameMeanings.name: Gruffudd
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old Welsh Grip(p)iud, from an unexplained first element + a second element meaning ‘lord, prince’. Gruffydd ap Llewelyn ( d. 1063 ) was one of the most able rulers of Wales in the Middle Ages, scoring notable victories over the English until he was eventually defeated by King Harold in 1063 .

variants.name: Griffudd
meanings: From Old Welsh Grip(p)iud, from an unexplained first element + a second element meaning ‘lord, prince’. Gruffydd ap Llewelyn ( d. 1063 ) was one of the most able rulers of Wales in the Middle Ages, scoring notable victories over the English until he was eventually defeated by King Harold in 1063 .

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: Gruffudd ap Ieuan was born as the son of Ieuan ap Iorwerth and Dyddgu ferch Madog. He had at least 1 son.

fr.lifeSummary: Gruffudd ap Ieuan est né, fils de Ieuan ap Iorwerth et Dyddgu ferch Madog. Il a eu au moins 1 fils.

de.lifeSummary: Gruffudd ap Ieuan wurde, als Sohn von Ieuan ap Iorwerth und Dyddgu ferch Madog geboren. Er hatte mindestens 1 Sohn.

it.lifeSummary: Gruffudd ap Ieuan è nato il come figlio di Ieuan ap Iorwerth e Dyddgu ferch Madog. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio.

ja.lifeSummary: Gruffudd ap IeuanはIeuan ap IorwerthとDyddgu ferch Madogの息子として生まれた。彼は少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Gruffudd ap Ieuan(은)는 Ieuan ap Iorwerth(와)과 Dyddgu ferch Madog의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Gruffudd ap Ieuan nasceu filho de Ieuan ap Iorwerth e Dyddgu ferch Madog. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho.

ru.lifeSummary: Gruffudd ap Ieuan родился. Его родителей звали Ieuan ap Iorwerth и Dyddgu ferch Madog. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын.

es.lifeSummary: Gruffudd ap Ieuan nació como hijo de Ieuan ap Iorwerth y Dyddgu ferch Madog. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo.

th.–: ถึงแก่กรรม
